source.name: User distilled premium web UI prompt set
source.license_notes: Rules distilled from user-provided prompts for personal knowledge base use. Do not copy external media assets directly.

visual_traits: premium cinematic composition instead of generic templates
restrained color system with one accent family
large disciplined typography and strong hierarchy
material quality through glass, neutral surfaces, media, and precise borders
responsive layouts with asymmetry and whitespace
layout_rules: Choose one dominant visual direction: dark cinematic glass, black-white neutral SaaS, white editorial luxury, portfolio editorial dark, video-first immersive landing page, or premium AI product/design agency.
Avoid generic left-text-right-image as the default hero; prefer poster hero, giant staggered type, video-first hero, or product/agency hero.
Use large whitespace and scale contrast on desktop; stack vertically and keep CTA visible on mobile.
Use brand design topics only as secondary references; information-insufficient brand topics must not override the premium rules.
For dark premium UI use near-black backgrounds, white/95 primary text, white/60-80 body text, white/5-15 borders, and white/3-12 surfaces.
For white editorial UI use white background, black headline/logo/CTA, muted gray nav/body text, and rely on typography, spacing, media, and composition.
interaction_states: muted to white nav link hover
accessibility_notes: Maintain contrast on glass and video overlays.
Do not place white text over bright video without a gradient or dim overlay.
Avoid excessive animation and respect reduced motion.
Do not force desktop navigation into mobile layouts.
Use readable body copy widths around 32ch to 64ch.
implementation_hints: Use one accent system per page such as purple/pink gradient, blue steel gradient, or monochrome precision.
Use display/body font pairing such as Instrument Serif italic + Inter, Readex Pro, Inter, or Geist + Inter.
Hero titles should use line-height 0.8-0.95, letter-spacing -0.02em to -0.05em, and font-weight 400-500.
Use explicit z-index layering for media: video z-0, overlay z-0/z-5, content z-10/z-20, navbar z-50.
Use clamp or vw sizes for giant type and check mobile overflow.
Keep paragraphs concise and avoid filling every empty area.
avoid_when: many colors mixed in one page

quality.notes: Distilled from multiple detailed React/Tailwind premium landing page prompts covering glassmorphism, video hero sections, typography, motion, SaaS, portfolio, and editorial layouts.

retrieval.ai_summary: Default premium Web UI rules for agents: avoid generic blue-white SaaS templates; choose one dominant direction such as dark cinematic glass, monochrome SaaS, white editorial luxury, portfolio dark, video-first landing, or premium AI product. Use restrained color, large typography, cinematic media, subtle motion, responsive asymmetry, and implementation-ready component rules.
